supportBoundary: Synthetic TyranoScript null-key readiness fixture: identifies plaintext .ks/.ksx script data and lists script assets only. TyranoScript ships UTF-8 plaintext scenario data with no archive encryption, so the crypto posture is null-key; there is no dominant dedicated reinserter, so extraction, patch-back, helper, and runtime support are not claimed.

capabilities.limitation: plaintext .ks data is readable, but no dedicated TyranoScript text extraction adapter exists
no TyranoScript patch-back adapter; there is no dominant dedicated reinserter for the engine
no TyranoScript patch-back adapter; there is no dominant dedicated reinserter for the engine
TyranoScript scenario data is plaintext null-key; no key material or helper is required or provided
runtime support belongs to future Utsushi work, not this readiness fixture
